# GembaBlockchain

> Bulgaria's first blockchain — a public, decentralized, permissionless Proof-of-Stake
> Layer 1 (Cosmos SDK + Cosmos EVM on CometBFT) with full EVM compatibility, built for
> society, not speculation. Native utility coin: Gemba (GMB). By GEMBA EOOD (Varna, Bulgaria).

## Key facts
- Type: public, permissionless PoS L1; instant finality (~5s blocks); full EVM (Solidity, MetaMask, ethers/viem, Foundry).
- Native coin: Gemba (GMB) — a utility coin (cheaper service access, workplace access, tickets, perks), NOT for speculation. Fixed 100M supply, 0% inflation. No liquidity/DEX operated by the project; no fiat redemption.
- Cosmos chain-id: gemba-1 (mainnet) / gemba-testnet-1 (testnet). EVM chainId: 821206 (mainnet) / 821207 (testnet).
- Philosophy: built for public institutions and organizations to deliver services to citizens; founder holds no privileged power; decentralizing over time.

## Live (testnet)
- Explorer (GembaScan): https://testnet.gembascan.io
- Public RPC: https://rpc1.gembascan.io, https://rpc2.gembascan.io, https://rpc3.gembascan.io (chainId 821207, symbol GMB)
- DEX (GembaSwap): https://swap.gembachain.io
- Public registry listings (testnet, chainId 821207): listed in ethereum-lists/chains (the registry that powers chainlist.org, enabling one-click "Add to MetaMask") and in Blockscout's chainscout directory. Merged PRs: https://github.com/ethereum-lists/chains/pull/8413 and https://github.com/blockscout/chainscout/pull/241. These are testnet listings; mainnet (chainId 821206) is not yet launched.

## Testnet faucet & test stablecoins
- Public faucet (chainId 821207): contract 0x0147581e2351dD182edD651DFEfD955CB353f8aA. One combo faucet dispenses both native GMB and the test stablecoins. Free testnet assets per wallet every 24h: 0.1 GMB and 10,000 of each test stablecoin. Claim on the official site (https://gembachain.io/#faucet) or in the dApps (https://win.gembait.com/en/faucet , https://escrow.gembait.com/en/faucet).
- Test stablecoins (6 decimals, valueless test tokens, NOT real): USDT 0xF61647866ad7be8137230Ad688092D2f3F4A1666, USDC 0xc9af98AD8ae78086620821F9Ceb05842Dd7950CF, EURC 0x7Ff43282d7939418a3f0A308E2d48Dd93536044e.
- dApps accepting native GMB + these stablecoins: GembaWin (on-chain bounty/reward contests, https://win.gembait.com) and GembaEscrow (smart-contract escrow, https://escrow.gembait.com).

## GMB — what it's for & the 20% discount
- Official GMB info page: https://gmb.gembachain.io (what GMB is, what it can and cannot be used for, how to get it, how to earn it as a validator).
- The point of GMB: pay 20% less for Gemba ecosystem services when you pay in GMB. Discount rate is uniform 20%, computed at the fixed internal rate 1 GMB = €1 (this is a fee-accounting rate, NOT a market price — GMB has no market price, no buyback, no fiat redemption).
- dApps with the GMB discount: GembaEscrow, GembaWin, GembaTools (live on testnet — 20% off the service fee); GembaTicket (20% off ONLY the event-creation fee, NOT ticket purchases); GembaKitchen and GembaSniperBot (prepared, activating with mainnet GMB).
- What GMB can do: pay for those services at 20% off, pay network gas, stake to run/delegate to a validator, be freely transferred or gifted. What it cannot do: be sold back to us, be redeemed for fiat, be treated as an investment.
- Validators: bond GMB, run a node, earn protocol rewards from the pre-minted 20M reserve (zero inflation, reward = max(10, min(100, stake×1%)) GMB/day, min self-bond 1,000 GMB). Rewards are utility credit to spend on-chain (services at 20% off, gas, deploying contracts, transactions), not a financial return.

## Buy GMB
- GMB can be acquired with card or crypto via the GembaPay payment service: enter an EVM address + amount at https://gembachain.io/#buy; GMB is delivered automatically to that address once payment is confirmed. (Testnet GMB is valueless — the same flow will run on mainnet.) GMB is a utility coin, not an investment; the project provides no liquidity and runs no exchange.
